title: Question: Problem while trying to use generate with for statement

features.name: generate for with arithmetic expression on RHS of condition
features.description: Code should include a generate for loop where the condition has an arithmetic expression (not simple variable) on the right-hand side, such as (i*2+1)<input_length

features.name: generate for with unpacked 2D wire array access
features.description: Code should include a generate for loop that accesses a 2D unpacked wire array with index variables from the generate loop

features.name: genvar index with multiplication in loop increment
features.description: Code should include a generate for loop where the loop body uses arithmetic on the genvar index (i*2) to compute array offsets
